title: Working with windows
drDigitalIntro: Soon you'll learn to arrange your windows like a pro — moving them around, resizing them, maximizing, minimizing, going full screen, using Split View to see two at once, and switching between windows. This lesson is coming soon!
drDigitalSuccess: You're all caught up — window skills are on the way!
